last_success_patterns.summary: Automated in the goal-runtime runner: due periodic checkpoints now execute the configured bounded command bundle, append a run-local checkpoint-command event, and are only observed when that pass event and fresh generated_at evidence are both present. Keep profile verification blocked until a real completed 30m trial and the later 6h/2d/5d ladder evidence exist.

Automated on 2026-05-18 by adding --write-run-artifacts to auto-improve-goal-status and auto-improve-goal-finalize. Focused Makefile, goal status, and profile verification tests passed; make auto-improve-goal-status goal-profile-verification now leaves run_artifacts.status=clean while correctly preserving blockers for incomplete elapsed runtime and missing process heartbeat command evidence.

Automated on 2026-05-18 by adding writer provenance to goal-run audit events and making goal-profile-verification report runner_audit_current=false for status-only artifacts. Report-only artifacts can remain run_artifacts.status=clean, but profile command observability now blocks until runner-origin command evidence exists.

Automated on 2026-05-17 by making starter-bundle planning validation skip runtime-event appends for placeholder run ids and adding a regression that default starter-bundle validation emits no JSONL runtime events. Focused planning/template tests passed and git diff -- runs stayed clean after validation.

Completed in final closeout: make static ruff-strict-preview mypy-strict-preview passed; make test-public passed 333 tests; make public-check passed with command_fail_count=0; make release-source-package-check passed with ruff, mypy, and test-source-package clean; make check passed 666 tests; artifact freshness is pass/current with 305 records and zero attention/fail records; focused generated-report/session/report-sample contracts passed 42 tests.

stop_conditions: Do not promote while promotion_allowed is false.
Do not claim learning improvement while claim_wording_allowed is false.
Do not claim 5d sustained runtime while sustained_claim_allowed is false.
Do not advance beyond next_profile_required without elapsed runtime evidence for that profile.
Do not repeat forbidden patterns until their repair_target is closed.
